title: Career Opportunity Store Manager at Big Bazaar

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Store Manager at Big Bazaar
jsonLd.description:
Big Bazaar invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Store Manager at our Vadodara location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Big Bazaar:
Big Bazaar is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Category Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Big Bazaar!
